description: Fix build error in StakingScreen.kt, fix NewsDetailScreen image aspect ratio, add thumbnail and audio streaming to StoryDetailScreen
steps: 1. Fix StakingScreen.kt build error at line 139: Remove the custom `indicator` parameter from TabRow entirely. The `tabIndicatorOffset` extension is deprecated/removed in the Compose BOM 2024.06.00 version of Material3. Simply delete the `indicator = { tabPositions -> ... }` block (lines 136-142) so TabRow uses the default indicator behavior.

2. Fix NewsDetailScreen.kt: Change the AsyncImage modifier from `.fillMaxWidth().height(220.dp)` to `.fillMaxWidth().wrapContentHeight()` (remove fixed height). Change `contentScale = ContentScale.Crop` to `contentScale = ContentScale.FillWidth`. This makes the image display at full width with natural aspect ratio, not cropped. Keep the clip with rounded corners.

3. Fix StoryDetailScreen.kt - Add thumbnail image: Before the title Text, add an AsyncImage that displays `storyItem.imagePath` with the full URL constructed as `https://mystical-nusa.web.id/cerita/image/{storyItem.id}` (since imagePath is relative). Use `.fillMaxWidth().wrapContentHeight()` with `ContentScale.FillWidth` and rounded bottom corners, similar to NewsDetailScreen. Import coil.compose.AsyncImage, add `import androidx.compose.ui.draw.clip`, `import androidx.compose.ui.layout.ContentScale`, `import coil.compose.AsyncImage`.

4. Fix StoryDetailScreen.kt - Add audio streaming: Replace the placeholder audio button onClick with actual MediaPlayer usage. Add state variables `isPlaying` and a `remember { MediaPlayer() }` instance. On click, if not playing: prepare MediaPlayer with URL `https://mystical-nusa.web.id/cerita/audio/{storyItem.id}`, start it, set isPlaying=true. If playing: stop and reset, set isPlaying=false. Add a DisposableEffect to release the MediaPlayer on dispose. Change button text/icon based on isPlaying state. Import `android.media.MediaPlayer` and `androidx.compose.runtime.DisposableEffect`.
acceptance_criteria: StakingScreen.kt no longer references `tabIndicatorOffset` - uses default TabRow indicator
NewsDetailScreen shows image at natural aspect ratio (no fixed 220.dp height, uses FillWidth content scale)
StoryDetailScreen displays a thumbnail image from the story's image URL before the title
StoryDetailScreen audio button streams audio from `https://mystical-nusa.web.id/cerita/audio/{id}` using MediaPlayer, with play/stop toggle
verification: Check StakingScreen.kt does not contain 'tabIndicatorOffset' string
Check NewsDetailScreen.kt uses ContentScale.FillWidth and wrapContentHeight() instead of height(220.dp) and ContentScale.Crop
Check StoryDetailScreen.kt contains AsyncImage with the image URL pattern
Check StoryDetailScreen.kt contains MediaPlayer setup with the audio URL pattern
findings: All changes verified via grep - no tabIndicatorOffset references remain, NewsDetailScreen uses FillWidth and wrapContentHeight, StoryDetailScreen has AsyncImage and MediaPlayer with audio URL pattern. Cannot run Android build in sandbox but code is syntactically correct.
